reason: 宣布决定 means 'to announce a decision', not 'declare a decision'; 'declared' collocates poorly with 'decision' in English.

old: His educational background is very high.
new: He has a high level of education.
reason: 'Educational background is very high' is unnatural; 学历很高 means having an advanced level of education.
Headword 鸭子 does not appear in the original sentence_3; 烤鸭 does not contain the headword.

new: That duck ran into the house.

reason: Headword 牙齿 does not appear in sentence_2; 刷牙 uses only 牙, not the headword 牙齿.
Sentence_1 and sentence_2 are near-duplicates (both describe someone having beautiful/big eyes). Replaced with a distinct scenario.

old: He has a pair of big eyes.
new: He closed his eyes and thought for a moment.

reason: 摇铃 means to ring by shaking; the definition row is 'to shake', so 'shook' is more accurate than 'rang'.

old: The medical care conditions here are very good.
new: The standard of medical care here is very good.
reason: 'Medical care conditions' is awkward English; 'standard of medical care' is more natural.

old: The significance of this discovery is very important.
new: This discovery is of great significance.
reason: 'The significance is very important' is redundant; restructured for natural English.

old: The doctor advised him to change his diet habits.
new: The doctor advised him to change his dietary habits.
reason: 'Diet habits' is not standard English; the correct term is 'dietary habits'.

old: They advanced facing the other side.
reason: 'Advanced facing the other side' is unnatural English; 迎着对方前进 means moving toward each other.

old: He has worked in the movies and television industry for ten years.
new: He has worked in the film and television industry for ten years.
reason: 'Film and television' is the standard English collocation for 影视; 'movies and television' is non-idiomatic.

old: She dreams of entering the movies and television world.
new: She dreams of entering the film and television world.
reason: Same as above: 'film and television' is the standard English term for 影视.

old: She gathered her courage and told the truth of the matter.
new: She gathered her courage and told the true story of what happened.
reason: 真情 means the true/real facts of the situation, not simply 'the truth'; more specific translation is more accurate.

old: Her language ability is her superiority.
new: Her language ability is her greatest advantage.
reason: 'Her superiority' is unnatural English as a predicate noun; 优势 as a personal attribute is best rendered as 'advantage'.
